title.en: My Agent, My Way: Teaching Your Personal Assistant New Skills
title.es: Mi Agente, A Mi Manera: Enseñando Nuevas Skills a Tu Asistente Personal

description.en: Personalize your OpenClaw agent with the five `.openclaw` briefing files, document skill designs in `SKILLS_DESIGN.md`, and ship at least two custom skills using your existing Composio tools.
description.es: Personaliza tu agente OpenClaw con los cinco archivos de briefing en `.openclaw`, documenta el diseño de las skills en `SKILLS_DESIGN.md` y entrega al menos dos skills personalizadas usando tus herramientas de Composio ya conectadas.

sharing.en: I just completed My Agent, My Way: Teaching Your Personal Assistant New Skills with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy.
